TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Vincent_Askew, title = Vincent_Askew, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vincent_Askew} }

S.FORM: Vincent Askew sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 2, Vincent Askew, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Vincent Askew sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 2, Vincent Askew, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *inʦ~ʨent as~ɕkew s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *inʦ~ʨent as~ɕkew, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
